title: Chat/set: create and update chats
description:
Implement Chat/set in methods/chat.rs:
- Create: direct (participants: [contactId]), group (name, participants), channel (spaceId, name, description)
- Update: name, description, avatarBlobId, pinnedMessageIds, receiveTypingIndicators, receiptSharing, slowModeSeconds, memberPermissions
- Destroy: soft-delete, removes all participants
- Handle SetErrors: invalidProperties, notFound, forbidden, overQuota
- Handle rateLimited SetError (slow mode violation): include serverRetryAfter field
- Fixture tests: create direct, create group, update, destroy, rateLimited error

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/chat_set_*.json
